commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]

target.title: fix(heartbeat): prevent private text leak in message_tool_only mode
target.body:
## Summary

Prevent private message text leak when messages.visibleReplies is set to message_tool_only and the model responds with text instead of calling the heartbeat tool.

## Problem

When messages.visibleReplies is message_tool, the heartbeat runner expects the model to call heartbeat_respond. If the model instead responds with plain text (no tool call), the runner falls through to the main text delivery path and delivers the raw reply payload to the user channel — bypassing the configured privacy mode.

## Root Cause

In the response delivery section of heartbeat-runner.ts, after getReplyFromConfig, the code checks:
1. heartbeatToolResponse && !notify -> silent (correct)
2. !heartbeatToolResponse && no content -> ok-empty (correct)
3. Everything else -> delivers to channel (BUG)

When usesHeartbeatResponseTool is true but the model responds with text, case 3 triggers and the private text leaks.

## Changes

- **`src/infra/heartbeat-runner.ts`** — +32 lines: add an early-return guard before the existing heartbeatToolResponse checks. When usesHeartbeatResponseTool && !heartbeatToolResponse, treat the result as a silent heartbeat: restore session timestamp, send HEARTBEAT_OK ack (if visible), emit a silent ok-token event, and return without delivering any payload. Mirrors the existing !notify silent-return pattern.

## Testing

CI validation via existing heartbeat-runner.tool-response.test.ts. The change mirrors the existing !notify silent-return pattern with identical bookkeeping calls.

## Related

Closes #94053
